film.title: Inquilaab
film.overview: A wife grows suspicious of her successful husband, who has risen from the police to become a prominent politician. Her fears are confirmed when she discovers he is being used as a pawn by corrupt politicians to carry out their nefarious plans.

dialogues.dialogue: And this Government has stuffed cotton in its ears. From his air conditioned office, chief minister, has announced shamelessly, that public needn't panic, we're with you. You're colluding that's why, public is suffering.
it's vey important to catch them. Otherwise, public will lose faith in us. And it'll be a great shame for us. Chief Minister has been briefed by the intelligence department, about the secret report.
dialogues.cause_raw: inability to maintain law and order

dialogues.dialogue: But.- No ifs & buts. You're promoted, I've come to congratulate you. And because, I love you..,Hey, do you've any modesty or shame? Topic of shame aftemards. First answer my question. Why do I love you?

You're promoted, I've come to congratulate you. And because, I love you..,Hey, do you've any modesty or shame? Topic of shame aftemards. First answer my question. Why do I love you? Collision with you in the cinema house has vibrated my heart.

Operator, connect me to Bombay Police Commissioner, urgent. Hello, yes speaking. Yes...yes...What! Amarnath & Koya Koya Atachi, unbelievable. For our department it's a matter of great shame. Yes...yes...Don't worry. I'll deal with the matter very strictly. Yes...yes, alright. Bye, Thank you.
Anil Rai. Sir.- Oh Come Amarnath. Amarnath, I'm proud of you. After accomplishing this feat & receiving congrats from CM, You've put the entire department on a high pedestal.
Bravo, son bravo. I knew, my son can't go against me. May you live long, very good. I'm very proud of you. idiot. What are you doing?

Delhi crime branch has given a message that Amarnath, who is a blue eyed officer of our department, and our Govt. is proud of him. He's hand in glove with the International smuggler Koya Koya Atachi. What? No sir. It's wrong.
I'm doing all this. When he grows up. He can proudly say, I'm Sitaram's grandson. And the day my son sings your praise, or seeks your wealth,
You're braved to became a widow, But, you couldn't see your mother-land being devastated. I'm proud of you Asha. I'm lucky to get you as my wife. Please forgive me. Please forgive me.
